collection.title: 1. Information Collection
collection.content: We collect the following types of information when you use Transparent Domain:

items.research: Research activity data (submitted reports, review history)

usage.title: 2. How We Use Information
usage.content: Collected information is used to: provide and improve our services, verify user identity and academic background, process community reports and score updates, send service-related notifications, and analyze and enhance platform security. We will not use your personal information for purposes unrelated to the above.

sharing.title: 3. Information Sharing
sharing.content: We do not share your personal information with third parties except: with your explicit consent, when required by law or lawful government request, or to protect the rights and safety of Transparent Domain. We never sell your personal data.

storage.title: 4. Data Storage & Security
storage.content: Your data is stored in an encrypted PostgreSQL database. We employ industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information, including transport encryption (TLS), access controls, and regular security audits. Data is retained for the duration of your active account plus a reasonable backup period.

rights.title: 5. Your Rights
rights.content: Under applicable data protection laws, you have the following rights:

cookies.title: 6. Cookie Usage
cookies.content: We use essential cookies to maintain user sessions and language preferences. We do not use third-party tracking cookies or advertising cookies. You can disable cookies through your browser settings, though this may affect some functionality.

contact.title: 7. Contact Us
contact.content: For privacy-related inquiries, please contact us at:

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By using Transparent Domain, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the platform. We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time, with material changes communicated via website notice or email.

eligibility.title: 2. Eligibility
eligibility.content: You must be at least 16 years old to use this platform. The Community Participant role requires a valid educational institution email (.edu or .edu.cn), and you must confirm that you are or have been a student or researcher at a higher education institution. Administrators reserve the final right to verify your academic identity.

accounts.title: 3. User Accounts
accounts.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities under your account. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts for terms violations or extended inactivity. Each natural person may register only one account.

community.title: 4. Community Participant Obligations
community.content: As a Community Participant, you agree to: report observed academic behaviors honestly and accurately, provide reliable evidence for each report, refrain from malicious or false reporting against individuals, and comply with platform report frequency limits. Violations may result in revocation of Community Participant status.

content.title: 5. Content Guidelines
content.content: All content posted by users on the platform must:

items.accuracy: Be based on facts and verifiable evidence
items.harassment: Not contain harassment, defamation, or personal attacks
items.privacy: Not disclose private information of others

termination.title: 6. Termination
termination.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate user accounts at any time for any reason, including terms violations, false reporting, or abuse of platform resources. Upon termination, your public content may be retained in anonymized form.

disclaimer.title: 7. Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: Transparent Domain is provided as-is. We make no warranties regarding the completeness, accuracy, or reliability of the information. The rating system combines automated algorithms with community input and does not constitute a legal judgment of an individual's academic ability. Please refer to the detailed Disclaimer page.

contact.title: 8. Contact Us
contact.content: For questions about these Terms of Service, please contact:

ratings.title: Rating System Notice
ratings.content: Transparent Domain's rating system is an automated assessment tool based on public data and community reports. Scores do not constitute a final judgment of an individual's academic ability, professional qualifications, or moral character. Ratings are limited by the completeness of data sources and accuracy of community reports.

accuracy.title: Information Accuracy
accuracy.content: Researcher profiles displayed on this platform (including names, institutions, publications, contact information, etc.) are sourced from publicly accessible platforms (Google Scholar, ORCID, ResearchGate, etc.) and collected through automated processes. We make no warranties, express or implied, regarding the accuracy, timeliness, or completeness of this information.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Links
thirdParty.content: This platform may contain links to external websites (such as arXiv, DOI links, personal homepages, etc.). We assume no responsibility for the content, privacy policies, or practices of these third-party sites.

correction.title: Correction & Removal Requests
correction.content: If you are a researcher listed on this platform and believe your profile contains inaccurate information or wish to have it removed, please contact us via the email below. We will review and process your request within 15 business days. For clear factual errors, we commit to correction within 5 business days.

methodology.title: Rating Methodology
methodology.content: Scores are calculated based on the following factors:

items.citations: Citation metrics and H-index (from Google Scholar and other public sources)
items.peerReview: Quantity and quality of peer-reviewed publications
items.communityReports: Community reports approved by administrator review

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, Transparent Domain and its operators shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from the use of or reliance on information from this platform. Academic evaluation is inherently complex and multi-dimensional; quantitative scores are provided for reference only.
